---
title: "Walk to Ocean Beach"
date: 2026-02-23
description: "An overcast afternoon walk through Golden Gate Park to Ocean Beach."
image: IMG_9612.jpg
categories: [San Francisco]
---

A grey February afternoon walking west through Golden Gate Park to the ocean. Overcast skies, green grass, bison, and windswept trees.

{{< include ../../_includes/photo-map.qmd >}}

## Golden Gate Park

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Fusce auctor nulla at felis cursus, vel tristique sapien venenatis. Praesent in lacinia arcu. Sed hendrerit justo a lectus fermentum, non bibendum risus malesuada. Nulla facilisi. Vivamus vel tortor at libero tincidunt feugiat sed non odio.

::: {layout="[2,1]"}
![](IMG_9604.jpg){group="walk" description="Metson Lake and a lone cypress."}

![](IMG_9607.jpg){group="walk" description="A crow on the trail."}
:::

::: {layout="[1,2]"}
![](IMG_9605.jpg){group="walk" description="Cypress tree at the edge of Metson Lake."}

![](IMG_9606.jpg){group="walk" description="Path along the lake, eucalyptus in the distance."}
:::

![](IMG_9609.jpg){group="walk" description="Glimpse through the eucalyptus."}

## Bison Paddock

Curabitur euismod, urna at sagittis tincidunt, nunc libero aliquet nunc, id facilisis sapien magna ac eros. Donec sit amet diam vel purus lacinia fermentum. Integer posuere erat a ante venenatis dapibus. Maecenas sed diam eget risus varius blandit sit amet non magna.

::: {.callout-note}
## A herd since 1891
Golden Gate Park has kept a herd of American bison since 1891, making it one of the oldest conservation herds in the country. The current paddock near the western edge of the park is home to a small herd that grazes year-round.
:::

::: {layout="[[2,1],[1]]"}
![](IMG_9610.jpg){group="walk" description="The herd grazing on a green hillside."}

![](IMG_9611.jpg){group="walk" description="Bison at the paddock."}

![](IMG_9612.jpg){group="walk" description="Bison resting under overcast skies."}
:::

## Ocean Beach

Etiam porta sem malesuada magna mollis euismod. Nullam id dolor id nibh ultricies vehicula ut id elit. Vestibulum id ligula porta felis euismod semper. Cras justo odio, dapibus ut facilisis in, egestas eget quam.

![](IMG_9613.jpg){group="walk" description="Arriving at Ocean Beach — bluffs and windswept cypresses along the Great Highway."}
